ddls:
CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the customer */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job title of the customer */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the customer */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the customer */,
  "default_status" TEXT /* Whether the customer has a history of defaulting */,
  "annual_balance" INTEGER /* Annual balance of the customer */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Loan status of the customer */,
  "additional_income" INTEGER /* Additional income of the customer */,
  "employment_length" INTEGER /* Length of employment of the customer */,
  "housing_status" TEXT /* Housing status of the customer */,
  "family_size" INTEGER /* Size of the customer's family */,
  "credit_score" INTEGER /* Credit score of the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_contacts" (
  "contact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contact event */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the contact */,
  "last_contact_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the last contact in seconds */,
  "contacts_current" INTEGER /* Number of contacts currently ongoing */,
  "contacts_previous" INTEGER /* Number of previous contacts */,
  "days_since_last_contact" INTEGER /* Number of days since the last contact */,
  "contact_method" TEXT /* Method of contact */,
  "contact_outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the contact */,
  "contact_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the contact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_contacts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "campaign_type" TEXT /* Type of the campaign */,
  "outcome" TEXT /* Outcome of the campaign */,
  "campaign_budget" INTEGER /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience of the campaign */,
  "campaign_channel" TEXT /* Channel used for the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign outcome */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer involved in the campaign */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign */,
  "subscription_status" TEXT /* Whether the customer subscribed as a result of the campaign */,
  "outcome_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the campaign outcome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_outcomes_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_outcomes_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer for whom the prediction is made */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign the prediction is for */,
  "predicted_subscription" TEXT /* Predicted likelihood of the customer subscribing */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the prediction */,
  "prediction_method" TEXT /* Method used to make the prediction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_predictions_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user within the system */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the user's role */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_assets" (
  "asset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each campaign asset */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the asset belongs to */,
  "asset_type" TEXT /* Type of asset */,
  "asset_url" TEXT /* URL of the asset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("asset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_assets_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who provided the feedback */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the campaign the feedback is for */,
  "feedback_text" TEXT /* Text of the feedback */,
  "feedback_rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_feedback_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
